<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Ensure Clean Worktree<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Fail when tracked files were modified by an earlier verification step.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                                            | Required | Default        |
|---------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|----------|----------------|
| `label`             | Human-readable step or command label for error output. | `false`  | `verification` |
| `include-untracked` | Also fail when untracked files are present.            | `false`  | `false`        |
| `working-directory` | Directory containing the Git checkout.                 | `false`  | `.`            |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/ensure-clean-worktree" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Ensure verification did not modify tracked files"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/ensure-clean-worktree@main"
   with:
    label: "release:check"
```

<!--/usage-->
